title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
